themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Articles focusing on AI agents that can autonomously perform research tasks, plan, and execute workflows.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Content detailing AI tools that aid developers in writing, reviewing, and optimizing code.

themes.name: AI research tools
themes.description: Articles discussing the landscape of AI tools specifically designed to support and enhance research processes.

themes.name: AI summarization
themes.description: Focuses on AI's ability to condense large amounts of text, such as meeting transcripts or research papers, into concise summaries.

themes.name: AI usability testing
themes.description: Explores how AI is used to automate, enhance, or analyze aspects of usability testing.

themes.name: AI chatbot research
themes.description: Content specifically about using or researching AI chatbots for various applications.

themes.name: AI qualitative research
themes.description: Articles on how AI assists in qualitative data analysis, sentiment analysis, and understanding user feedback.

themes.name: AI for design & research
themes.description: Covers AI applications that directly assist in the design and user research processes, including UI generation and workflow automation.

themes.name: AI workforce impact
themes.description: Research and analysis on how AI is affecting jobs, skills, and the overall labor market.

themes.name: AI summarization insights
themes.description: Articles focusing on AI's ability to summarize information and extract meaningful insights from it.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
